channel.title: NPR Topics: World
channel.description: NPR world news, international art and culture, world business and financial markets, world economy, and global trends in health, science and technology. Subscribe to the World Story of the Day podcast and RSS feed.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: UN chief visits Haiti, where a new 'gang-suppression force' will be deployed
item.description: U.N. Secretary-General António Guterres's visit to Port-au-Prince comes as gang violence persists. According to U.N. data, 2,300 people have been killed in Haiti this year, with another 100 kidnapped.
item.content:encoded:
U.N. Secretary-General António Guterres's visit to Port-au-Prince comes as gang violence persists. According to U.N. data, 2,300 people have been killed in Haiti this year, with another 100 kidnapped.

(Image credit: Danica Coto)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: U.S. strike on an alleged drug boat kills 1, leaves 2 survivors
item.description: The U.S. military attacked a boat accused of smuggling drugs in the eastern Pacific Ocean on Tuesday, killing one man and leaving two survivors. This brings the number of people who have been killed in boat strikes to at least 208.
item.content:encoded:
The U.S. military attacked a boat accused of smuggling drugs in the eastern Pacific Ocean on Tuesday, killing one man and leaving two survivors. This brings the number of people who have been killed in boat strikes to at least 208.

(Image credit: Jacquelyn Martin)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: In Albania, anger grows against the government for supporting a Kushner-linked luxury resort
item.description: Albania's government has given preliminary approval to plans for the luxury resort along a stretch of coastline, prompting daily protests and legal challenges by environmental groups.
item.content:encoded:
Albania's government has given preliminary approval to plans for the luxury resort along a stretch of coastline, prompting daily protests and legal challenges by environmental groups.

(Image credit: Vlasov Sulaj)
item.dc:creator: Rob Schmitz

item.title: How Israel could complicate Iran peace negotiations. And, World Cup highlights
item.description: Israel has been sidelined in the agreement between the U.S. and Iran. It could spoil peace negotiations. And, it's been a thrilling start to the World Cup.
item.content:encoded:
Israel has been sidelined in the agreement between the U.S. and Iran. It could spoil peace negotiations. And, it's been a thrilling start to the World Cup.

(Image credit: Atta Kenare)
item.dc:creator: Suzanne Nuyen

item.title: Israeli ambassador to U.S. says Israel is 'not going to withdraw from South Lebanon'
item.description: NPR's Steve Inskeep asks Israel's ambassador to the U.S. Michael Leiter about the peace deal the Trump administration says it's made with Iran.
item.content:encoded:
NPR's Steve Inskeep asks Israel's ambassador to the U.S. Michael Leiter about the peace deal the Trump administration says it's made with Iran.

(Image credit: Andrew Harnik)
item.dc:creator: Steve Inskeep

item.title: G7 leaders meet for first full day of summit Tuesday
item.description: President Trump meets with G7 leaders, as well as Ukrainian President Zelenskyy and the heads of Qatar and UAE, during the key summit's first full day.
item.content:encoded: President Trump meets with G7 leaders, as well as Ukrainian President Zelenskyy and the heads of Qatar and UAE, during the key summit's first full day.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Kurtzleben

item.title: G7 allies scramble to put Ukraine back atop Trump's agenda as war drags on
item.description: U.S. allies at the Group of Seven summit are pushing the war in Ukraine back on President Donald Trump's agenda. The Iran conflict has recently overshadowed the war in Ukraine.
item.content:encoded:
U.S. allies at the Group of Seven summit are pushing the war in Ukraine back on President Donald Trump's agenda. The Iran conflict has recently overshadowed the war in Ukraine.

(Image credit: Thibault Camus)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Trump arrives in France for G7 leaders summit, touting peace deal with Iran
item.description: French president Emmanuel Macron met with Trump and congratulated him for signing the new Iran agreement.
item.content:encoded: French president Emmanuel Macron met with Trump and congratulated him for signing the new Iran agreement.
item.dc:creator: Franco Ordoñez

item.title: U.K. announces social media ban for children under 16
item.description: The UK government has announced it will ban social media for all children under 16. British Prime Minister Keir Starmer said he was "giving children their childhood back."
item.content:encoded: The UK government has announced it will ban social media for all children under 16. British Prime Minister Keir Starmer said he was "giving children their childhood back."
item.dc:creator: Fatima Al-Kassab

item.title: U.S. and Iran reach an agreement, but details remain scant
item.description: President Trump says a deal had been reached to prolong a ceasefire with Iran and open the Strait of Hormuz, but many challenges remain.
item.content:encoded: President Trump says a deal had been reached to prolong a ceasefire with Iran and open the Strait of Hormuz, but many challenges remain.
item.dc:creator: Greg Myre
